title: How to land a junior ad agency job: Leaders offer advice - Ad Age
text:
Agencies
How to land a junior ad agency job—what leaders say works as roles change due to AI
Gift Article
Share
Expand
Chris Byrne, co-founder of AI-backed creative production shop Winston, shares what he looks for in emerging talent today. Pictured here are recent new entry-level hires at the agency: Associate Project Director Andres Bermudez (left) and Design Director Delfina De Benedictis (center), with Byrne (right).
(Courtesy of Winston)
LR
By
Lindsay Rittenhouse
